title: Software Architect (Full Stack)
description: About ICterra ICterra is a global software engineering company with offices in Munich, İstanbul and Ankara. We combine 30 years of software development experience with technology expertise and proven methodologies to provide innovative solutions to our customers across multiple industries globally. With 150+ software professionals, we have been building strategic partnerships with the world’s top IT and defence companies, providing software development and test services. Minimum 10 years of hands-on experience in C# programming and Angular Framework. Strong knowledge and development experience in .NET Framework, .NET Core, Entity Framework, Relational Databases (preferably SQL Server and PostgreSQL), NoSql Databases (preferably MongoDB) and RESTful Web Services and Git-based Version Control Systems Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript Proficiency in developing User Interface components using HTML5. Proven experience writing database queries for RDBMS such as T-SQL, MySQL, and PostgreSQL, as well as NoSQL databases like MongoDB. Familiarity with Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) and Microservices design principles. Experience in Docker for containerization and deployment. Hands-on experience in CI/CD pipelines and Azure DevOps practices. Minimum 5 years of experience in the design and integration of systems. Basic knowledge of Linux Working knowledge of XML, XSLT, and XSD is a plus. Ability to recommend software changes/enhancements to improve system performance and reliability. Ability to contribute to discussions on software architecture, code reviews, and continuous improvement. Strong English communication skills (a part of the interview will be conducted in English). No restrictions for international travel. At least 2 years of experience working in Agile teams, with exposure to methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban. Collaborative mindset with good problem-solving skills. Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related technical discipline.

title: Senior Java Backend Developer  – API & Web Servis Uzmanı
description: Backend tarafında gerçekten güçlüysen ve “sıradan API yazarı” değil, sistemi ayakta tutan kişiysen bu ilan sana göre. Biz, yüksek trafikli ve kritik sistemlerde çalışacak; performans, güvenlik ve ölçeklenebilirlik konularında işi sahiplenen bir Java Backend Developer arıyoruz. Özellikle API geliştirme, web servis geliştirme ve api gateway yönetimi senin uzmanlık alanın olmalı. Ayrıca bankacılık fonksiyonlarına ve finansal sistemlere güçlü hakimiyet bu rol için kritik. Bu rolde ne yapacaksın? * Yüksek performanslı backend servisleri geliştireceksin, * RESTful API’lerin yanı sıra SOAP / REST tabanlı web servisleri tasarlayıp geliştireceksin, * Servislerin entegrasyon, versiyonlama ve backward compatibility süreçlerini yöneteceksin, * Bankacılık süreçlerine yönelik servisleri geliştireceksin (ödeme, para transferi, hesap yönetimi), * FAST, EFT, SWIFT ve kartlı ödeme sistemleri ile ilgili entegrasyonlarda görev alacaksın, * API’leri sadece yazmayacak, doğru şekilde tasarlayıp yöneteceksin, * Api gateway üzerinde API lifecycle, güvenlik ve trafik yönetimini üstleneceksin, * Sistemi iyileştirecek, sadeleştirecek ve gerektiğinde yeniden kurgulayacaksın. Bizim için olmazsa olmazlar; * Java + Spring Boot ile gerçek proje deneyimi (4-5 yıl), * REST API geliştirmede ileri seviye bilgi, * Web servis geliştirme deneyimi (SOAP / REST), * Api gateway deneyimi, * Mikroservis mimarisinde çalışma deneyimi, * Bankacılık / finans domain bilgisi, * (FAST, EFT, SWIFT, kartlı ödeme sistemleri, hesap yönetimi) * Servis entegrasyonları (third-party, internal) konusunda deneyim, * Kod kalitesine yüksek önem veren, * Problemi sahiplenen ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşım. Seni öne çıkaracak şeyler; * Bankacılık projelerinde aktif görev almış olmak, * Api gateway üzerinde aktif proje deneyimi, * Docker / Kubernetes bilgisi, * Cloud (özellikle GCP) deneyimi, * Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde çalışmış olmak, * ESB / entegrasyon katmanları hakkında deneyim.

title: Full Stack Developer +4
description: İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde yürütülen uluslararası ve/veya yurt içi projelerde görev alacak, deneyimli ve yetkin takım arkadaşları aramaktayız. Genel Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, İyi seviyede İngilizce okuma, yazma ve anlama becerisine sahip, Uluslararası veya yurt içi projelerde çalışma deneyimi bulunan, Ankara’da ikamet eden veya edebilecek , Yurt içi ve yurt dışı seyahat engeli bulunmayan, Kişi güvenlik belgesi alınmasına engel herhangi bir durumu bulunmayan. Teknik Deneyim ve Yetkinlikler A. Aranan Yetkinlikler En az 4 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Java Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security) ve Eksen Framework konularında tecrübeli, Angular, PrimeNG ve TypeScript ile frontend geliştirme deneyimi olan, Veri yapıları, nesne yönelimli tasarım ve programlama konularında bilgi sahibi, MongoDB ve PostgreSQL ile veritabanı tasarımı konusunda deneyimli, Mikroservis mimarisi , web servisleri ve Sürekli Entegrasyon (CI) süreçlerinde deneyim sahibi, Kafka ve RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma sistemleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Yazılım mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi, Yazılım konfigürasyon ve kalite yönetimi süreçlerine hâkim, REST API ve JSON tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda tecrübeli. B. Tercih Edilen Yetkinlikler Tercihen Kovan altyapısı konusunda deneyiminin olması, Docker ve Kubernetes ile geliştirme deneyimi olan, CSS ve Bootstrap ile arayüz geliştirme deneyimi bulunan, QueryDSL tecrübesine sahip, Git, DOORS, JIRA, Jenkins, Nexus, Harbor gibi yazılım yaşam döngüsü araçlarını kullanabilen, ArgoCD hakkında bilgi sahibi, Agile / Scrum metodolojileri konusunda deneyimli.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: About Fraktal Fraktal is a computational design studio building AI-powered software for architects. Our flagship product Archly (archly.ai) is a live AI visualization platform serving architects and design studios. Based in Ankara, Istanbul, and London. About the Role We're looking for a full stack engineer to work on Archly and the broader Fraktal product ecosystem. What you'll do: - Build and ship features across the full stack (Laravel backend, Vue 3 frontend) - Integrate AI model APIs (image generation, video, 3D, real-time) - Work on payment systems, credit management, and user workflows - Improve performance, reliability, and developer experience - Contribute to infrastructure (Redis, MySQL, AWS S3, Laravel Horizon) What we're looking for: - Strong Laravel and Vue.js experience - Comfortable with both backend logic and frontend UI - Experience with REST APIs and third-party service integration - Understanding of database design and query optimization - Ability to ship independently. Small team, real responsibility. Nice to have: - Experience with Inertia.js - Familiarity with AI/ML APIs (fal.ai, Replicate, OpenAI, etc.) - Experience with payment integration (Stripe, iyzico, or similar) - Interest in architecture, design tools, or creative software - Tailwind CSS proficiency Stack: - Backend: Laravel 12 (PHP 8.4), MySQL, Redis, Laravel Horizon - Frontend: Vue 3, Inertia.js v2, Tailwind CSS 4 - Infrastructure: Hetzner VPS, AWS S3, Nginx, GitHub Actions CI/CD - Monitoring: Sentry (backend + frontend), GA4 Details: - Full-time or part-time (discussed during interview) - Remote-friendly, Ankara preferred for hybrid - Compensation: competitive, discussed during interview Apply: Send your CV/GitHub and a short note to info@fraktal.design

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Backend Developer in Turkey . This is an exciting opportunity to join a globally distributed engineering team working on advanced digital finance and blockchain-powered technologies. The role focuses on building and maintaining scalable backend systems that support high-performance financial services used by users around the world. As a senior developer, you will contribute to the architecture, optimization, and security of critical backend infrastructure while collaborating with product, engineering, and design teams in an Agile environment. The position offers exposure to cutting-edge technologies including blockchain integrations, distributed systems, and high-availability architectures. You will play a key role in developing secure and reliable APIs, improving platform scalability, and delivering innovative new features. This role is ideal for a proactive backend engineer who thrives in fast-paced, remote-first environments and enjoys solving complex technical challenges at scale. Accountabilities Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs that support scalable and high-performance financial platforms. Collaborate closely with developers, product managers, designers, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into practical and efficient technical architectures. Improve and optimize existing backend services written in Node.js to enhance reliability, scalability, and system performance. Develop new backend solutions and integrations that interact with distributed services and microservice-based architectures through RPC calls. Write and optimize complex database queries for operational, financial, and compliance-related processes. Contribute to platform scalability initiatives to ensure real-time responsiveness and seamless user experiences as system demand grows. Apply strong security principles and best practices across backend services to protect infrastructure, transactions, and user data. Participate actively in Agile development processes, code reviews, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement initiatives. Support the maintenance and evolution of backend infrastructure, messaging systems, caching layers, and job queue architectures. Requirements At least 5 years of professional experience working with JavaScript and Node.js backend development. Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems design principles. Experience contributing to the development and maintenance of complex, large-scale platforms or applications. Solid experience working with relational and NoSQL databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies, frameworks, and engineering practices. Strong understanding of backend security concepts, secure API development, and infrastructure protection best practices. Experience with high-availability systems, scalability optimization, and real-time application performance is highly valued. Familiarity with blockchain integration concepts is considered a strong advantage. Knowledge of additional technologies such as Redis, message queues, caching systems, and job queues is preferred. Experience with Ruby and Ruby on Rails is a plus. Strong communication and collaboration skills within remote and cross-functional Agile teams. Benefits Fully remote work environment with global collaboration opportunities. Opportunity to work on innovative blockchain and digital finance technologies at large scale. Exposure to cutting-edge backend architectures, distributed systems, and high-availability platforms. Flexible and fast-paced work culture focused on innovation and continuous improvement. Career growth opportunities within a rapidly evolving global technology environment. Collaboration with highly skilled international engineering and product teams. Participation in impactful projects shaping the future of digital financial services and infrastructure. Dynamic and entrepreneurial environment that encourages ownership and technical creativity. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Backend / Data Engineer (Python Entry-Level)
description: We process data from 200,000+ employer career portals and major job boards, running large-scale scraping infrastructure, complex ETL pipelines, and ML enrichment models across billions of records. This is not a typical web app role. You will work directly with one of the largest job market datasets in the world: 900M+ unique postings, each enriched with 82 fields. What You Will Do Build and maintain web scraping systems that collect job postings from thousands of sources using Scrapy, Playwright, and custom crawlers. Design and optimize data processing pipelines that clean, deduplicate, and transform raw job postings into structured, enriched records. Work with our database layer across PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Aerospike, and ClickHouse, each serving a specific role in our data architecture. Write Python scripts and services for data ingestion, validation, and quality assurance across the pipeline. Deploy and monitor your work using Docker on cloud infrastructure (AWS, Google Cloud). Collaborate with ML engineers who build the NLP models that enrich the data you process. Who You Are You have a Master's degree (preferred) or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. You are proficient in Python, with experience writing production scripts, data processing code, or backend services. You are comfortable working in Linux/Unix environments and writing shell scripts. You have experience with at least two of: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, or another database system. You have some experience with web scraping (Scrapy, Playwright, Selenium, BeautifulSoup, or similar tools). You understand data formats (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and have worked with messy, real-world data. Nice to Have Experience with large-scale data pipelines or ETL systems. Familiarity with Docker and containerized deployments. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or Google Cloud). Knowledge of asynchronous programming in Python (asyncio, aiohttp). Familiarity with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, or Redis queues). Experience with ClickHouse, Aerospike, or other specialized databases. Exposure to NLP, machine learning, or data enrichment workflows. Familiarity with Kubernetes.

title: Senior Backend / Data Engineer - Pipeline & Schema
company: IBC Yapay Zeka ve Finansal Teknolojiler
description: Rol Hakkında Türkiye'deki yasal-mali doküman dünyasının kurallarını koda dökecek bir kıdemli backend geliştirici arıyoruz. Deterministik parser'lar, doğrulama (validator) altyapısı ve şema yönetimi senin sorumluluğunda olacak. Ne Yapacaksın ·       Yüksek hacimli yapılandırılmış metin pipeline'ları için Python kodu yazmak (parser, ETL, validator) ·       Pydantic v2 ile sıkı tipli şemalar tasarlamak ve evolve etmek ·       Matematiksel tutarlılık + format + zorunlu alan kontrollerini içeren çok katmanlı doğrulama katmanı kurmak ·       Regression-proof altyapı: golden corpus, snapshot testleri, severity tier'lı uyarı sistemi ·       Türkiye vergi mevzuatı (UBL, KDV, tevkifat, stopaj) bilgisini schema'ya taşımak Aradığımız Profil ·       Production Python'da 5+ yıl deneyim ·       Defensive programming, edge-case yönetimi ve idempotent design alışkanlığı ·       Regex ileri seviye, parser yazımı deneyimi (PDF, XML, JSON, UBL) ·       pytest, snapshot testing, CI/CD hijyeni ·       Veri kalitesi, schema evolution ve backward compatibility'ye dair vizyon ·       Vergi/muhasebe alanına yatkınlık veya bu alanda öğrenme istekliliği Tercihen ·       UBL / e-fatura / e-arşiv ekosistem deneyimi ·       Fintech background ·       Açık kaynak katkıları Çalışma & Süreç ·       Çalışma şekli: Hybrid Ankara / remote dostu ·       Süreç: CV → 30dk teknik mülakat → 90dk pair-coding → 30dk culture chat —————————————————————————————————— About the Role We're hiring a senior backend engineer to translate the rules of Turkey's tax/finance document domain into code. You'll own deterministic parsers, validation infrastructure, and schema evolution. What You'll Do ·       Build high-volume structured-text pipelines in Python (parsers, ETL, validators) ·       Design and evolve strictly-typed Pydantic v2 schemas ·       Stack multi-layer validation: math consistency, format checks, required-field enforcement ·       Build regression-proof infrastructure: golden corpora, snapshot tests, severity-tiered alerts ·       Encode Turkish tax-domain rules (UBL, VAT, withholding, deduction) into the schema You Bring ·       5+ years shipping production Python ·       Defensive programming, edge-case discipline, idempotent design instincts ·       Strong regex skills, parser-writing experience (PDF, XML, JSON, UBL) ·       pytest, snapshot testing, CI/CD hygiene ·       A point of view on data quality, schema evolution, backward compatibility ·       Appetite for tax/accounting domain — or willingness to learn it deeply Nice to Have ·       UBL / e-invoice / e-archive ecosystem experience ·       Fintech background ·       Open-source contributions Working & Process ·       Setup: Hybrid Ankara / remote-friendly ·       Process: CV → 30-min tech chat → 90-min pair-coding → 30-min culture

title: Full Stack Developer (React,.NET)
description: Şirket Profili Kuveyt Türk Katılım Bankası’nın %100 iştiraki olarak 2015 yılından beri dijital ürün ve hizmetler geliştiren Architecht, bilişim sektöründe faaliyet gösteriyor. Açık bankacılık, ana bankacılık, tedarikçi finansmanı, güvenlik teknolojileri, alternatif kanal çözümleri, yazılım geliştirme, destek ve danışmanlık hizmetleri sunan şirket, bankalar, telekomünikasyon şirketleri, teknoloji şirketleri ve bireysel emeklilik şirketleri gibi geniş bir yelpazede finansal çözümler sağlıyor. Kuruluşunun ilk yılında Türkiye’nin ilk 500 büyük şirketi arasına giren, 2019 yılında Türkiye’nin en hızlı büyüyen teknoloji şirketi olan ve bugün 700’ü aşkın çalışanı ile finansal teknolojiler geliştiren Architecht, Great Place to Work® Sertifikasyon programına göre son 6 yıldır Türkiye’nin En İyi İşverenleri arasında yer alıyor. Aranan Nitelikler: 4 yıllık üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, İşletme Mühendisliği, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri, Matematik Mühendisliği veya Elektrik&Elektronik Mühendisliği bölümünden mezun, En az 5 yıllık tam zamanlı full stack geliştirme deneyimi, React, JavaScript ve Node.js ile çalışma deneyimi, Sağlam, ölçeklenebilir, sürdürülebilir ve yüksek kaliteli web uygulamaları oluşturma deneyimi, C# ve .NET Framework ile backend geliştirme deneyimi, Uygulama mimarisi konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak, HTML, CSS gibi web teknolojileri konusunda derinlemesine bilgi, Kapsamlı MSSQL bilgisi, Elasticsearch ve Kafka ile deneyim sahibi olmak tercih edilir. Docker ve diğer DevOps araçlarına aşinalık arzu edilir. Mükemmel problem çözme becerileri ve hem bağımsız çalışabilme hem de takım içinde işbirliği yapabilme becerisi, Hızlı tempolu bir işyerinde iletişim kurma ve çalışma yeteneği, Sözlü ve yazılı İngilizce iletişimde akıcılık. İş Tanımı: React, JavaScript ve Node.js gibi modern web teknolojileriyle çalışarak, kullanıcı dostu ve etkileyici web uygulamaları oluşturma, C# ve .NET Framework kullanarak, ölçeklenebilir, güvenli ve yüksek kaliteli backend sistemlerinin tasarım ve geliştirme süreçlerine katkı sağlama, Uygulama mimarisi konusunda deneyim sahibi olarak, sistem bileşenlerini uygun bir şekilde tasarlama, entegrasyonu gerçekleştirme ve kod kalitesini sağlama, HTML, CSS ve diğer web teknolojilerini kullanarak, kullanıcı arayüzlerinin tasarım ve geliştirme süreçlerine katkı sağlama, Veri tabanı yönetimi konusunda kapsamlı bilgiye sahip olarak, MSSQL veritabanlarının etkin bir şekilde yönetimi ve veri manipülasyonu Docker ve diğer DevOps araçlarıyla aşina olarak, uygulamaların hızlı, güvenli ve yüksek kaliteli bir şekilde dağıtımına katkıda bulunma, Hızlı tempolu bir ortamda çalışarak, proje teslim tarihlerine uyum sağlama ve etkili iletişim kurma.

title: Mid React Native Engineer
description: Company Description Papcorns is a mobile app studio building design-driven mobile products used by millions of people around the world. Our apps reach more than 10 million users and are frequently featured by Apple and Google . We believe great products are built by curious people who enjoy learning and experimenting. At Papcorns, we focus on developing AI-powered mobile apps in the Utilities, Photo & Video, and Lifestyle categories, mainly for the US market. Our team builds and scales multiple products while constantly exploring new technologies. As our products and user base continue to grow, we are looking for curious and motivated Junior React Native Engineers who want to grow with us. Role Description This is a full-time hybrid role for a Junior React Native Engineer at Papcorns. You will work closely with experienced engineers, designers, and product managers to build and improve mobile applications used by millions of people. This role is a great opportunity to develop your skills in a real product environment and learn how high-quality mobile apps are built and scaled. The role is based in Istanbul, Türkiye , with flexibility for some remote work. Qualifications 3–4 years of experience in mobile development with React Native Solid knowledge of JavaScript / TypeScript Strong understanding of CSS and UI styling in a mobile context Solid experience working with REST APIs Comfortable with Git and collaborative workflows Ability to use AI coding tools such as Cursor, Windsurf, or Claude Code Curiosity for learning new technologies and improving your skills Ability to collaborate with teammates and communicate ideas clearly Experience with Expo or React Native CLI Familiarity with state management tools such as Redux Basic knowledge of Firebase Understanding of mobile app deployment workflows Interest in mobile performance and user experience Responsibilities Own the development of mobile features using React Native from scoping to production Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to improve product quality Write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code while sharing best practices with the team Diagnose and fix bugs and performance issues proactively Participate actively in code reviews and technical discussions Continuously learn and bring new ideas and approaches to the team What’s in it for you? Competitive Salary Optional Work From Home Opportunity 3 days a week Meal & Commute Compensation Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Access to Online Courses Tech Gear What it’s like to work at Papcorns? Be part of a passionate and fast-moving team where everyone’s ideas are valued Work on products used by millions of people around the world Access to learning and development opportunities What does the recruitment process look like? Application Review We review your CV to understand your experience and interests. Interview A 30-minute Google Meet interview with our co-founders to get to know each other and talk about your expectations. Technical Meeting A Google Meet session with our team lead to discuss your solution and talk about technical topics. Case Study You will complete a small assignment related to the role to demonstrate your approach to problem solving. Final Decision Within a few days, we will inform you of our decision regarding your suitability for the role.

title: PHP Developer (Hybrid)
description: Your role: PHP Developer (Hybrid) Location: Istanbul (Asia) / Turkey Who is PIONR? Pionr builds fintechs to empowers you to make wise money decisions, uncover hidden opportunities, and connect the dots that lead to your true priorities. Say goodbye to money problems and hello to a future filled with calm, security, and hope. Let Pionr bring love back to finance and guide you towards creating your own dream. We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced PHP Developer to join our Tahsildar growing team. In this role, you will contribute to end-to-end product delivery (backend + basic frontend) by developing high-performance web applications and APIs, as part of a modern CI/CD and container-focused team. Experience & Skills: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field. Advanced knowledge of PHP (OOP, MVC; experience with Laravel, Symfony, or custom MVC). Databases: PostgreSQL and/or MySQL (indexing, explain plans, migration management). Containers: Proficiency with Docker or similar technologies. Messaging & Caching: Knowledge/experience with Redis, RabbitMQ. CI/CD: Familiarity with Git-based workflows; GitHub Actions/GitLab CI or similar tools. Version control & quality: Git, code review, unit testing (PHPUnit), OWASP awareness. Full-stack contribution: HTML/CSS/JS and basic proficiency in at least one modern JS framework. Proven ability to manage multiple accounts and projects simultaneously. Strong analytical skills and a data-driven mindset. The PHP Developer is expected to: Develop new services with PHP 8.x; improve and maintain existing code. Write clean, testable code using OOP/MVC principles. Design, document, and integrate RESTful APIs. Schema design and query optimization on PostgreSQL/MySQL. Manage local development and production environments with Docker/Compose. Build scalable architectures using Redis (cache/sessions) and RabbitMQ (queue/async processes). Operate and improve CI/CD pipelines (build, test, deploy). (Full-stack) Basic frontend development: HTML/CSS/JS and preferably React/Vue for small/medium-scale screens. Join Us At Pionr, we benefit from the power of technology and science, and we achieve the best with our creative and innovative team. Lifelong learning, open-mindedness, and leadership are part of our culture. We celebrate all our achievements and special moments together. Interviews will be held continuously. Therefore, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. If you have any questions, please contact our teammate Sema Bulut.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a talented Full Stack Developer to join our growing team at Luminex and help us progress our product. You will be working across both front-end and back-end development, building robust, scalable, and secure web applications that directly support our products. This role requires versatility and hands-on expertise with a variety of technologies, as you'll be expected to contribute to all layers of development. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable, and secure full-stack web applications Build intuitive and responsive user interfaces using JavaScript frameworks Develop server-side logic, APIs, and database interactions using Java, PHP, and SQL Create, maintain, and optimize front-end components using HTML, JavaScript, jQuery, and CSS frameworks (e.g., Tailwind, Bootstrap) Write scripts and integrate with back-end processes where the GUI acts as a wrapper to bash scripts Ensure code quality through proper testing, debugging, and adherence to coding standards Integrate third-party libraries, APIs, and systems into the application Maintain and enhance existing applications, ensuring compatibility with evolving technologies Monitor application performance and troubleshoot issues to ensure optimal functionality Collaborate with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications Work closely with cross-functional teams, including UI/UX designers, QA engineers, and DevOps teams Requirements 5+ years of experience as a Full Stack Developer or in a similar role Hands-on experience in building and deploying full-stack web applications Front-End Development: Proficiency in JavaScript and jQuery Strong understanding of component-based architecture Experience with modern build tools (PhpStorm etc...) Knowledge of responsive design and CSS frameworks (Bootstrap) Back-End Development: Strong proficiency with PHP development Experience with PHP frameworks (Zend, Laraval) Experience building RESTful APIs and microservices Proficiency in SQL and database systems (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB) Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms (e.g., OAuth, JWT) Experience with bash scripting is a strong plus Additional Skills: Proficiency with Git and version control best practices Experience with Angular Strong problem-solving, debugging, and analytical skills Ability to thrive in a collaborative, cross-functional environment

title: Mobile Developer (React Native)
description: We are a technology company building scalable digital products and AI-powered solutions for our clients. Our team consists of 70+ developers, designers, and testers working on end-to-end software development projects. We focus on modern architectures, AI-assisted development approaches, and high-impact solutions across industries. We are looking for a experienced Mobile Developer (React Native) for our leading client in the automotive sector. In this role, you will take ownership of the mobile architecture, build scalable cross-platform applications, and ensure a seamless, native-like experience for end-users. What You’ll Do Design, build, and maintain high-performance, robust mobile applications for both iOS and Android platforms using React Native. Manage the complete mobile lifecycle, from architectural decisions and seamless API integrations to App Store and Google Play deployments. Optimize applications for maximum speed, smooth UI transitions, and scalability under high user load. Write clean, maintainable code, lead code review processes, and provide technical mentorship to foster a culture of excellence. What We Are Looking For 6+ years of hands-on professional experience in mobile application development, with a strong, proven focus on React Native. Strong communication skills, with the ability to clearly convey complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Deep expertise in modern React principles, advanced state management, and a solid understanding of native iOS/Android ecosystems. Strong foundation in Clean Code practices, SOLID principles, and hands-on experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Fastlane, Bitrise). High motivation and willingness to work fully from the office (100% on-site) in a dynamic environment.

title: React Native Mobile Developer Stajyeri Arıyoruz
description: Vize başvuru süreçlerini ve seyahat planlamayı dijitalleştiren yenilikçi bir platformuz. Bireysel kullanıcılar ile doğrulanmış vize danışmanlık firmalarını tek çatı altında buluşturuyoruz. Aktif olarak geliştirilmekte olan mobil uygulamamızın geliştirme sürecinde rol alacak, gerçek bir ürün deneyimi kazanmak isteyen takım arkadaşları arıyoruz. Bu pozisyon sadece eğitim amaçlı değil; gerçek kullanıcıları olan bir startup ürününün gelişim sürecinde aktif rol alma fırsatı sunuyor. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎯 Ne Yapacaksın? → React Native ile mevcut mobil uygulamanın geliştirme süreçlerine destek olmak → Yeni ekranlar, özellikler ve kullanıcı deneyimi geliştirmeleri üzerinde çalışmak → REST API entegrasyon süreçlerinde görev almak → UI geliştirme ve component yapılarında deneyim kazanmak → Hata düzeltme, test ve performans iyileştirmelerine katkı sağlamak → Gerçek bir startup ekibiyle ürün geliştirme süreçlerini deneyimlemek ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ✅ Kimler Başvurabilir? → React Native, React.js veya JavaScript tarafına ilgi duyan → Kendini mobil uygulama geliştirme alanında geliştirmek isteyen → TypeScript, API yapıları veya state management konularına meraklı → Takım çalışmasına uyum sağlayabilecek → Gerçek proje deneyimi kazanmak isteyen öğrenci veya junior geliştiriciler → Portföyünü güçlü bir proje ile geliştirmek isteyen adaylar ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💼 Çalışma Modeli → Tamamen uzaktan ve esnek çalışma → Gönüllü / deneyim odaklı çalışma modeli → Resmi zorunlu staj kapsamında değildir → Gerçek ürün geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alma fırsatı → Referans mektubu ve startup deneyimi → Başarılı ekip arkadaşlarıyla uzun vadeli çalışma fırsatı ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🚀 Neler Kazanacaksın? → Gerçek bir mobil uygulama geliştirme deneyimi → Startup kültürü ve ürün geliştirme süreçlerini öğrenme fırsatı → CV ve portföy için güçlü bir referans proje → Takım içi yazılım geliştirme pratiği → Yayında olan bir ürün üzerinde çalışma deneyimi ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ #ReactNative #MobileDeveloper #Stajyer #JuniorDeveloper #Startup #UzaktanÇalışma #JavaScript #TypeScript #iOS #Android #YazılımGeliştirme

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER (AI, AUTOMATION & PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE) About the Company We are representing a global healthcare group undergoing a large-scale digital transformation. The organization is actively building an AI-powered, data-driven digital ecosystem aimed at redefining patient experience, operational efficiency, and clinical-support processes across its international operations. As part of this strategic transformation, the company is establishing a high-performance engineering function focused on scalable architecture, AI integration, and next-generation automation systems. Role Overview We are seeking a Senior Full Stack Developer (AI & Automation Focus) who will act as a key technical leader within the engineering organization. This role goes beyond development — it requires strong architectural ownership, system design leadership, and hands-on contribution to AI-driven platform development. You will be instrumental in building enterprise-grade systems from the ground up, shaping technical standards, and working closely with cross-functional teams including Data Science, Product, and Infrastructure. Key Responsibilities Architecture & System Design Lead the design and development of scalable, secure, and high-performance full-stack architectures Define and evolve microservices-based system architecture and API-first design principles Make key technical decisions on system structure, scalability, and long-term maintainability AI & Automation Integration Design and implement AI-powered solutions including: Natural Language Processing (NLP) Computer Vision / Image Recognition Recommendation and prediction systems Integrate machine learning models into production-grade applications Collaborate with Data Science teams on model deployment, optimization, and monitoring strategies Full Stack Development Build and maintain modern web applications using: Node.js, React, Next.js Python (Django / FastAPI) TypeScript-based architectures Develop robust backend services, APIs, and real-time data processing systems Cloud & Infrastructure Oversee cloud-native architecture on AWS and/or Azure Ensure scalability, reliability, and performance of distributed systems Work closely with DevOps teams on CI/CD pipelines and deployment strategies Technical Leadership Provide technical direction and mentorship to engineering teams Establish coding standards, best practices, and engineering guidelines Participate in architectural reviews and strategic technical planning Quality, Security & Compliance Ensure systems meet enterprise-level security and data protection standards Maintain high performance and observability across platforms Contribute to technical documentation and R&D compliance processes Required Qualifications 7+ years of professional software development experience 3+ years in a senior/lead or architecture-focused role Strong experience in full-stack development and system design Proven experience with AI/ML integration in production environments Strong background in scalable systems, microservices, and cloud architecture Experience in healthcare tech, fintech, or large-scale e-commerce platforms Excellent analytical thinking and system-level problem-solving ability Fluent English (written and spoken) Preferred / Nice to Have Experience in startup or high-growth product environments Hands-on experience designing systems from scratch (0→1 products) Exposure to distributed systems at scale Experience working in regulated environments (healthcare preferred) Strong understanding of data engineering concepts Ideal Candidate Profile We are looking for a senior-level engineering professional or emerging technical architect who thrives in complex, fast-evolving environments. The ideal candidate is someone who: Thinks at system and platform level, not just feature level Enjoys building scalable architecture from scratch Has strong opinions on engineering excellence and system design Can balance speed of execution with long-term architectural vision Is motivated by building impactful AI-driven products in healthcare
